task_completion.description: Create a dive trip with the correct name and location.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a trip header or entry in the dive list or trip edit panel showing the name 'Red Sea Liveaboard 2022' and location 'Hurghada, Egypt'.

task_completion.description: Record a manual dive with the correct date and time.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a dive entry or information panel showing the date 'September 10, 2022' (or '2022-09-10') and time '08:00'.

task_completion.description: Set the correct dive duration and maximum depth.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the dive's profile or information tab showing a duration of '55' minutes and a max depth of '28.0m'.
Look for the 'Buddy' field in the dive information tab containing the text 'Sara Al-Rashid'.
Look for the 'Notes' field in the dive information tab containing the text 'Night dive around the wreck of the SS Thistlegorm'.

task_completion.description: Save the trip and dive data.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the newly created dive appearing under the 'Red Sea Liveaboard 2022' trip in the main dive list, with no unsaved changes indicator (e.g., an asterisk in the title bar), or a save action being executed.

integrity.description: The agent used the Subsurface GUI to create the trip and dive, rather than terminal commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Subsurface application window should be visible and actively used. Terminal windows should not show commands like 'sed', 'echo', or python scripts modifying the .ssrf file directly.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the application's input fields and dialogs.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show dropdowns, text fields being filled, or the 'Add Dive' dialog open in Subsurface, rather than just the final result appearing instantly.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a text editor to manually edit the XML/SSRF save file.
integrity.visual_evidence: No text editors (like nano, vim, gedit) should be open displaying XML dive data.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected trip name: 'Red Sea Liveaboard 2022'. Expected trip location: 'Hurghada, Egypt'. Expected dive date: '2022-09-10' (September 10, 2022). Expected dive buddy: 'Sara Al-Rashid'. Expected dive time: 08:00. Expected duration: 55 minutes. Expected max depth: 28.0m. Expected notes: 'Night dive around the wreck of the SS Thistlegorm'.
